race.comment: GLISSANDO (4) never looked happy in the heavy conditions on debut when running fifth over 1150m at Randwick Kensington. Gets the benefit of Grima's claim again and looking for this trip and further. Go close. QUADRIA (11) back for her second campaign after showing ability on the provincial circuit last prep. Placed in both barrier trials and did finish third here last March. Value prospect. RAPID REVENUE (3) reared at the start on debut and found the 1150m too sharp when ninth at Randwick Kensington on the heavy (9) surface. Blinkers go on and will appreciate the extra trip. Finds an easier contest. SWIFT DELIVERY (6) Flying Artie filly from Wordplay on debut for the David Pfieffer yard. Blinkers and lugging bit go on after the two trials. Can play a leading role in the small field.
